commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway dashboard summary and incident APIs, a global tool activity registry, background process/autonomy summaries, overview polling, Mission Control panels, and unrelated root/script/test changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings via source inspection: the PR's event listeners, WeakMap scheduling, and tool status logic expose concrete failure paths against current main contracts. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
